Create the next big Web3 event in your city. Fill out the form and show the world!

Event Creation Form
Provide the specifics for your new event. The more detail you add, the more engaging it will be for attendees!

Enter time in IST

City and exact location.

The more detail you provide, the more attendees you'll attract!

Why should people attend? What will they get?

Maximum attendees. Leave blank for unlimited.

A good image that represents your event.
